HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar Dec-09-2009 Denied

Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption And Ntc Of Oppos. To Claim Of Exemption And Pos
Off Calendar Nov-24-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Clifton Inohara, Esq., appeared telephonically for Judgment Creditor: First Resolution Investment Corp.; Allyson Martinez, Judgment Debtor

RULING: After hearing, Hearing On Claim Of Exemption is denied in part and granted in part. Wages of $1,086.09- withhold $271.52; reimbursement of $720.84 not claimed to be exempt. Remainder or $5,668.23 exempt as financial aid to be returned to the judgment debtor. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
